submissions.app_golden_code:
import numpy as np
N = 4
j = np.arange(N)[:, None]
k = np.arange(N)[None, :]
Q = np.exp(2j * np.pi * j * k / N) / np.sqrt(N)
golden = Q.conj().T
submissions.construction_method: Conjugate transpose of the raw 2-qubit QFT matrix.

submissions.app_golden_code:
import numpy as np
def perm2(y):
    return y if y in (0, 15) else (2*y) % 15
perm = [perm2(y) for y in range(16)]
N = 32
golden = np.zeros((N, N), dtype=complex)
for i in range(N):
    if i < 16:
        golden[i, i] = 1.0
    else:
        w = i % 16
        w_out = perm[w]
        o = 16 + w_out
        golden[o, i] = 1.0
submissions.construction_method: Controlled permutation on 4-bit work register: identity when control=0, y -> 2y mod 15 when control=1 (15 fixed).

submissions.app_golden_code:
import numpy as np
def perm4(y):
    return y if y in (0, 15) else (4*y) % 15
perm = [perm4(y) for y in range(16)]
N = 32
golden = np.zeros((N, N), dtype=complex)
for i in range(N):
    if i < 16:
        golden[i, i] = 1.0
    else:
        w = i % 16
        w_out = perm[w]
        o = 16 + w_out
        golden[o, i] = 1.0
submissions.construction_method: Controlled permutation on 4-bit work register: identity when control=0, y -> 4y mod 15 when control=1 (15 fixed).

submissions.app_golden_code:
import numpy as np
H = np.array([[1,1],[1,-1]], dtype=complex)/np.sqrt(2)
I = np.eye(2, dtype=complex)
N = 8
cz = np.ones(N, dtype=complex)
cs = np.ones(N, dtype=complex)
for i in range(N):
    q0 = (i >> 2) & 1
    q1 = (i >> 1) & 1
    q2 = i & 1
    if q0 and q2:
        cz[i] = -1
    if q1 and q2:
        cs[i] = 1j
Q = np.exp(2j*np.pi*np.arange(4)[:,None]*np.arange(4)[None,:]/4)/2
iqft2 = Q.conj().T
golden = np.kron(iqft2, I) @ np.diag(cs) @ np.diag(cz) @ np.kron(np.kron(H, H), I)
submissions.construction_method: QPE of S: H on counting qubits, controlled-Z (U^2) on q0->q2, controlled-S (U^1) on q1->q2, inverse QFT on counting register.

submissions.app_golden_code:
import numpy as np
H = np.array([[1,1],[1,-1]], dtype=complex)/np.sqrt(2)
I = np.eye(2, dtype=complex)
N = 16
cz = np.ones(N, dtype=complex)
cs = np.ones(N, dtype=complex)
ct = np.ones(N, dtype=complex)
for i in range(N):
    q0 = (i >> 3) & 1
    q1 = (i >> 2) & 1
    q2 = (i >> 1) & 1
    q3 = i & 1
    if q0 and q3:
        cz[i] = -1
    if q1 and q3:
        cs[i] = 1j
    if q2 and q3:
        ct[i] = np.exp(1j*np.pi/4)
Q = np.exp(2j*np.pi*np.arange(8)[:,None]*np.arange(8)[None,:]/8)/np.sqrt(8)
iqft3 = Q.conj().T
golden = np.kron(iqft3, I) @ np.diag(ct) @ np.diag(cs) @ np.diag(cz) @ np.kron(np.kron(np.kron(H, H), H), I)
submissions.construction_method: QPE of T: H on counting qubits, controlled-Z (U^4) on q0->q3, controlled-S (U^2) on q1->q3, controlled-T (U^1) on q2->q3, inverse QFT on counting register.

submissions.app_golden_code:
import numpy as np
H = np.array([[1,1],[1,-1]], dtype=complex)/np.sqrt(2)
I = np.eye(2, dtype=complex)
def f2(y):
    return y if y in (0,15) else (2*y) % 15
def f4(y):
    return y if y in (0,15) else (4*y) % 15
cU2 = np.zeros((128,128), dtype=complex)
for i in range(128):
    c2 = (i >> 4) & 1
    if c2 == 0:
        cU2[i, i] = 1.0
    else:
        w = i % 16
        cU2[(i & ~15) | f2(w), i] = 1.0
cU4 = np.zeros((128,128), dtype=complex)
for i in range(128):
    c1 = (i >> 5) & 1
    if c1 == 0:
        cU4[i, i] = 1.0
    else:
        w = i % 16
        cU4[(i & ~15) | f4(w), i] = 1.0
Q = np.exp(2j*np.pi*np.arange(8)[:,None]*np.arange(8)[None,:]/8)/np.sqrt(8)
iqft3 = Q.conj().T
H3 = np.kron(np.kron(H, H), H)
golden = np.kron(iqft3, np.eye(16, dtype=complex)) @ cU2 @ cU4 @ np.kron(H3, np.eye(16, dtype=complex))
submissions.construction_method: Shor period-finding for N=15,a=2: Hadamard on counting register, controlled-U^2 (cmul4) on q1->work, controlled-U^1 (cmul2) on q2->work, inverse QFT on counting register.
